message:
🐛 Fix AI-ML cards missing demo badge in demo mode (#680)

Add showDemoBadge field to CardDemoStateResult interface to separate
"which data to use" from "show demo indicator". For stack-dependent
cards, shouldUseDemoData is false when a stack is selected (even if
it's a demo stack), but showDemoBadge is true when global demo mode
is active.

Updated all 6 LLM-d cards to report showDemoBadge instead of
shouldUseDemoData to useReportCardDataState, ensuring the demo badge
and yellow outline display correctly on console.kubestellar.io.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
